title: Bedrock Sorcerer
description:
"Bedrock Sorcerer Data Pack".
its a Super Power Data pack with 5 spells and 1 tp create bedrock sorcerer armor and use the spells
version from 1.16 to latest
body:
This time I present you "Bedrock Sorcerer Data Pack".
its a Super Power Data pack.

Bedrock Sorcerer Data pack work by Creating Bedrock Armor set,
All recipes are mention in the images,
Bedrock Sorcerer have 5 Spells with 1 Sneak + Jump TP power,
after activation of Armor eye becomes red and health will be 50hp,
Bedrock Sorcerer Texture pack have glowing effects [Emission],
after activation all 5 spells are divided into 5 Slots,
first 5 slots are the spells,
1 slot works when you hit any entity,
other 4 slots work without hitting any entity just left click.

All 5 Spells and TP are-

1] Bedrock Burst       [Blast the any entity by hitting and also give you absorption for 10 seconds]
2] Summon Golems       [Summon 4 Bedrock Golems]
3] Domain Expansion    [Create a private Domain where your Strength, Speed , Regeneration and Health will be increased, it's only works when you are inside your domain]
4] Domain Collapse     [Where your Domain will be disappear with your extra Strength, Speed , Regeneration and Health]
5] Domain Imprisonment [where you imprison your enemy in your domain also you will be outside the Domain and also summon 1 Bedrock Creeper who will kill your enemy]
6] TP                  [By Sneak + Jump you will be tp 40+ above from your current location]

Please Read Everything Carefully Before Using the Data Pack

Optifine required for texture pack.
Without Optifine texture pack may not work properly.

Bedrock Sorcerer Have two Packs without both packs Bedrock Sorcerer may not work properly

1] Bedrock Sorcerer DP [Data Pack]
2] Bedrock Sorcerer RP [Texture Pack]

Create new world with Data pack and reload it [/reload]
or you can use in your old world by first reload it [/reload] then save the world
and re-enter the old world and reload it [/reload] it will do some changes and then it will work.

Crafting recipe of Bedrock Sorcerer Armor Set-

1] Helmet      [1 Netherite Helmet + 8 Bedrock surrounding the Helmet]
2] Chest plate [1 Netherite Chest plate + 8 Bedrock surrounding the Chest plate]
3] Leggings    [1 Netherite Leggings + 8 Bedrock surrounding the Leggings]
4] Boots       [1 Netherite Boots + 8 Bedrock surrounding the Boots]
5] Sword       [1 Netherite Sword + 8 Bedrock surrounding the Sword]


This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.16 TO Latest version

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files


Enjoy the "Bedrock Sorcerer DataPack".


THANKS FOR DOWNLOADING.
